title: Public Contact Channel
description: A single PUBLIC contact channel discovered for a company. Only public, company-published channels are allowed. Personal emails and phone numbers are never guessed.

value.description: The public channel value (e.g., info@company.sa, +9665..., or a URL).

source.description: Where it was found: official_website | contact_page | public_social | public_directory | public_job_post | public_news | google_business

is_public.description: Must be true. Non-public channels are never stored.

is_personal.description: True only when a named person is published BY the company on a public page. Defaults false.
